home.metadataTitle: New Sky - F&B Restaurant Design and Construction
home.metadataDescription: Design and construction partner for F&B restaurants in Vietnam - 10 years with Aladdin, in-house interiors, kitchen stainless steel, and signage.

metadata.title: Capabilities - New Sky
metadata.description: 6 restaurant F&B contractor capabilities, a 3,000sqm in-house workshop, and New Sky's delivery process.

hero.title: End-to-end restaurant design and construction from concept to opening day.
hero.description: New Sky organizes 6 capabilities under one restaurant-focused contractor: design, interiors, MEP, kitchen stainless steel, construction, and signage, followed by installation, handover, and maintenance.

capabilitiesIntro.title: A capability system for the full restaurant delivery lifecycle.
capabilitiesIntro.description: From design, interiors, MEP, kitchen stainless steel, construction, and signage, New Sky gives the project one accountable lead; MEP and construction are coordinated through subcontractors, while the remaining scopes are handled in-house.

capabilities.title: Design
capabilities.description: Concept, functional layout, and technical drawings aligned with each restaurant brand position.

capabilities.title: Interiors
capabilities.description: Production and installation of restaurant interior items through New Sky's workshop for stronger design-to-build consistency.

capabilities.title: MEP Systems
capabilities.description: Coordination of electrical, water supply, wastewater, ventilation, smoke extraction, and related restaurant technical requirements.

capabilities.title: Industrial Kitchen Stainless Steel
capabilities.description: Stainless-steel tables, shelves, cabinets, sinks, and kitchen items produced at the Ha Dong workshop.

capabilities.title: Construction
capabilities.description: Coordination of site renovation, partitions, and floor, wall, and ceiling finishes according to approved drawings.

capabilities.title: Signage
capabilities.description: Production of stainless-steel lettering, UV signage, and pano signage to align frontage, space, and brand touchpoints.

factory.title: 3,000sqm in-house workshop in Ha Dong, Hanoi
factory.description: The Ha Dong workshop helps New Sky produce interiors, industrial kitchen stainless steel, and signage in-house, improving control over the scopes New Sky directly delivers for restaurant F&B projects.

processIntro.title: From survey to handover, every step has clear scope, timing, and ownership.
processIntro.description: This process is shaped by 10 years and more than 100 restaurant projects, balancing schedule, quality, and clear accountability before contract signing.

process.title: Survey
process.scope: Measure the site, record electrical, water, and drainage conditions, and review landlord requirements for mall projects.

process.title: Design
process.scope: Initial concept and detailed drawings across architecture, interiors, MEP, and kitchen stainless steel, adjusted until approval.

process.title: Quotation + Contract
process.scope: Break down materials, labour, timeline, and equipment; prepare detailed quotation, sign contract, and collect deposit.

process.title: Workshop Production
process.scope: Produce stainless-steel and furniture items at the Ha Dong workshop while preparing construction and MEP materials in parallel.

process.title: Site Installation
process.scope: Transport and install stainless steel, MEP, and construction finishes, then test equipment on site.

process.title: Handover + Maintenance
process.scope: Acceptance, technical document handover, initial operation guidance, and maintenance request intake after handover.

deliverables.title: Service deliverables
